[Contact us](https://www.deutschemesse.co.uk/contact)

## CEBIT 2019

- - -

Deutsche Messe have taken the difficult decision to bring CEBIT to a close. Following 33 years promoting Europe's IT & Digital industries, CEBIT industry related topics will now be integrated with Hannover Messe, the world's leading Industrial Technology trade show.

## Want to learn more about CEBIT?

Call the Deutsche Messe UK & Ireland team on

[+44 203 384 3666](tel:+4402033843666) (UK) or [+35312238668](tel:+35312238668) (Ireland).
